pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-004 (Data Quality/Task) scores 0.434 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.434) and is edge_case for the Data Classification Specialist role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for specialist-level Data Classification Specialist.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, DDaT signal (0.434), and Data Quality handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does DDaT signal (0.434) for this Data Quality KSA reflect actual Data Classification Specialist requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 50-80% of Data Classification Specialist job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at specialist level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.434 is market-validated for Data Classification Specialist. Final decision: include.
